meta.name: KingKong
meta.author: petpet-builtin
meta.description: A titan beast forged from stone and circuitry. Hard difficulty — only deliberate progress (tasks completed, subagents dispatched) and AI token usage feed it. Idle chat won't budge the meter. Roughly 2.5× the time investment of Sun.

species.name: KingKong
species.description: King Kong — born from a starlit black-stone egg, evolving from young primate to armoured titan to cyber-god. Demands real work, not chitchat.
species.flavor: Forged in obsidian, ascending in titanium.
